title: coreopsis bolanosana
intro: Coreopsis bolanosana, also known as Bolanos' tickseed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Coreopsis bolanosana include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight infections, making it a useful remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis bolanosana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
